name: Blue Shrimp Fettuccine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine room temperature cheeses with wine and cream in a 2-quart casserole.
2. Add seasonings and shrimp (cooked, shelled and deveined) and bake in a 375°F oven until heated through, about 20 minutes.
3. Toss with 8 oz fettuccine which has been cooked according to package directions.
